---
title: "clean_jsdoc.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\clean_jsdoc.js"
loc: 32
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.45
style_score: 3.37
intel_score: 8.90
overall_score: 4.89
---

## Intent
The `clean_jsdoc.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on cleanDuplicates, content, regex. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via cleanDuplicates, content, regex. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fs)

### Exports
- `cleanDuplicates`
- `content`
- `regex`
